name: Perun Rune Leather Necklace
description: A handcrafted leather necklace bearing the rune of Perun, symbolising power, protection, and warrior spirit.

name: Mokosh Rune Leather Necklace
description: A leather necklace featuring the rune of Mokosh, representing destiny, feminine strength, and protection of the home.

name: Veles Rune Leather Necklace
symbol: Veles (god of the underworld and wisdom)
description: A rune necklace dedicated to Veles, embodying mystery, knowledge, and connection to the unseen world.

name: Mokosh Cards Booster Pack
description: A sealed booster pack from the Mokosh Cards collection. Discover Slavic gods, spirits, and legends in each pack.

name: Thrones of the Old Gods Booster
description: A themed booster pack featuring Slavic deities such as Perun, Mokosh, and Veles. Part of the Mokosh Cards collection.

name: Custom Leather Watch Painting
description: A custom hand-painted leather artwork inspired by your chosen watch. Each piece is unique and made to order.

name: Soviet Watch Leather Artwork
description: A handcrafted leather painting inspired by vintage Soviet watches, blending horology and art into one collectible piece.
